name: fused_rank16_update_kernel
strategy: Fuse B.T @ X, A @ (result), and addition to W @ X into a single custom kernel to reduce launch overhead and memory traffic. Keep cuBLAS for the large W @ X GEMM. Vectorized float4 stores when d is divisible by 4 (all target d are). Expected speedup over baseline by eliminating multiple intermediate tensor allocations and kernel launches.
